title: YTP Tennis: Doubled E Seduces the Fembot
description:
Round 1 of YTP Tennis vs. MahsuginaChicken

This is a rematch of a Tennis we played back in December 2007.  How will it play out this time?  Enjoy! :)


((Note: 90% of this Poop is Ed Edd n Eddy material because I used pieces of the Ed Edd n Eddy Poop I've been working on.  I couldn't do anything with it anymore because the site where I get the episodes removed them, and they won't be back on for a month.  Plus, Youtube didn't have the clips I needed.  So instead of uploading an "unfinished" Poop, I decided to turn it into a Tennis Round.))
